title: J.S.Bach - The Well Tempered Clavier Book 1: Prelude and Fugue No. 17 in A flat Major
description:
Johann Sebastian Bach's Prelude and Fugue No 17, in A flat major, Well Tempered Clavier, Book 1.
Performed by Jean Trébuchet.

REBUILDING THE WORLD IN THE BRICS ERA
International Conference of the Schiller Institute
Paris, 13-14 June 2015
http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com
